title: vanilla PvP (smp)
description: everything you could possibly need to play minecraft survival multiplayer!
body:
### tired of looking for the best mods for the best smp gameplay on the latest version? check out the **vanilla pvp smp modpack**! :D

inspired from smp youtubers such as FlameFrags & Manepear, this modpack aims to deliver the best lag-free and optimized SMP gameplay ever, even for content creators!

# HIGHLIGHTS
- fps boosting and QOL mods **(eg. 3D skins, hand bobbing, no lava fog)** to make the gameplay way better with consistent FPS
- essential (and toggleable) pvp mods such as **appleskin**, **inventoryhud**, **shield** fixes and even marlow's **crystal optimizer**!
- easier grinding for SMP's with **LibrGetter** mod that automatically swaps through lecterns to find the desired trade
- **flashback** and **iris shaders** for content creators (totally optional)
- **essential** mod for cosmetics and in game chatting :D
- toggleable **minimap** to get a quick overview of your smp

& much more!
make sure to take your time and configure the mods in game to your choice for the **BEST GAMEPLAY EXPERIENCE** :)
